docket_entries.description: REMARK: RECEIVED RETURNED MAILED FROM THE POST OFFICE ON OCT 31/25. SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER, MAILED TO AHMET OZTURIC. RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON DEC 22, 2025. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION TO AHMET OZTURIC RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,526.27 FILED BY OZTURIC, AHMET AS TO DEFENDANT VAYNER, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DEFENDANT ALEX VAYNER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE - SEE ATTACHED.
